requirement_topic.en: EMC and CE Marking for Power Banks with Integrated Electronics
requirement_topic.zh: 集成电子元件移动电源的EMC与CE标志
requirement_topic.zht: 整合電子元件行動電源的EMC與CE標誌

summary.en: Power banks (portable battery packs with integrated charging circuitry, USB outputs, and display) are electronic apparatus subject to the mandatory essential requirements of the EU EMC Directive 2014/30/EU in addition to the Low Voltage Directive 2014/35/EU where in scope. If the power bank incorporates wireless functionality (e.g., Qi wireless charging output, Bluetooth state-of-charge indicator, NFC), the Radio Equipment Directive (RED) 2014/53/EU applies instead of or in addition to the EMC Directive. EN 55032:2015+A1:2020, EN 55035:2017+A11:2020, EN 300 328, EN 301 489-1, and EN 301 489-17 are voluntary harmonised standards that may give presumption of conformity when correctly applied. A CE technical file must cover all applicable directives.
summary.zh: 移动电源（集成充电电路、USB输出及显示屏的便携式电池组）作为电子装置，除适用范围内的低压指令2014/35/EU外，还须满足欧盟EMC指令2014/30/EU的强制性基本要求。若移动电源包含无线功能（如Qi无线充电输出、蓝牙电量指示、NFC），则须适用无线设备指令（RED）2014/53/EU（替代或叠加EMC指令）。EN 55032:2015+A1:2020、EN 55035:2017+A11:2020、EN 300 328、EN 301 489-1及EN 301 489-17为自愿协调标准，正确适用时可提供符合性推定。CE技术文件须涵盖所有适用指令。
summary.zht: 行動電源（整合充電電路、USB輸出及顯示幕的便攜式電池組）作為電子裝置，除適用範圍內的低壓指令2014/35/EU外，還須滿足歐盟EMC指令2014/30/EU的強制性基本要求。若行動電源包含無線功能（如Qi無線充電輸出、藍牙電量指示、NFC），則須適用無線設備指令（RED）2014/53/EU（替代或疊加EMC指令）。EN 55032:2015+A1:2020、EN 55035:2017+A11:2020、EN 300 328、EN 301 489-1及EN 301 489-17為自願協調標準，正確適用時可提供符合性推定。CE技術文件須涵蓋所有適用指令。

standards_or_laws: Directive 2014/53/EU — Radio Equipment Directive (RED) — applicable if wireless functions present
EN 55032:2015+A1:2020 — Multimedia equipment — Electromagnetic disturbances — Requirements
EN 55035:2017+A11:2020 — Multimedia equipment — Immunity characteristics — Requirements
EN 300 328 V2.2.2 — Wideband transmission systems (2.4 GHz) — applicable for Bluetooth/Wi-Fi

summary.en: China's domestic EMC requirements for electronic products are governed by GB/T 9254.1-2021 (Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of information technology equipment — Part 1: Class B equipment) for emissions, and GB/T 17618-2015 (Limits and methods of measurement of immunity characteristics of information technology equipment) for immunity. Products with wireless functions require SRRC (State Radio Regulation of China) type approval under MIIT administration, which is specific to Chinese radio frequencies and protocol implementations. Chinese GB/T EMC test reports and SRRC approval are NOT recognised under the EU EMC Directive or RED conformity assessment pathway.
summary.zh: 中国电子产品国内EMC要求：辐射方面适用GB/T 9254.1-2021（信息技术设备无线电骚扰特性的限值和测量方法——第1部分：B类设备），抗扰度方面适用GB/T 17618-2015（信息技术设备抗扰度特性限值和测量方法）。含无线功能的产品须依据工业和信息化部的SRRC（国家无线电管理委员会）型号核准，具体适用于中国无线电频段和协议实现。中国GB/T EMC检测报告及SRRC核准在欧盟EMC指令或RED合格评定路径下不被认可。
summary.zht: 中國電子產品國內EMC要求：輻射方面適用GB/T 9254.1-2021（信息技術設備無線電騷擾特性的限值和測量方法——第1部分：B類設備），抗擾度方面適用GB/T 17618-2015（信息技術設備抗擾度特性限值和測量方法）。含無線功能的產品須依據工業和信息化部的SRRC（國家無線電管理委員會）型號核准，具體適用於中國無線電頻段和協議實現。中國GB/T EMC檢測報告及SRRC核准在歐盟EMC指令或RED合格評定路徑下不被認可。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 9254.1-2021 — Information technology equipment — Radio disturbance characteristics — Part 1: Class B equipment (SAC/SAMR)
GB/T 17618-2015 — Information technology equipment — Immunity characteristics — Limits and methods of measurement (SAC)
SRRC type approval — State Radio Regulation of China, MIIT — required for products with wireless functions sold in China

gap.en: Power banks with integrated electronics (USB charging IC, protection circuit, display, or wireless function) must demonstrate conformity with the legal EMC or RED essential requirements. EN 55032/EN 55035 and RED harmonised standards are voluntary presumption-of-conformity routes, not mandatory or exclusive test methods. Chinese GB/T 9254 and SRRC approvals may support engineering review but are not accepted as standalone evidence for an EU technical file. For RED-applicable products: (1) the product must not transmit in EU-prohibited frequency bands; (2) a Notified Body assessment may be required for RED if the product uses non-harmonised radio interfaces; (3) the EU Declaration of Conformity must list all applicable directives (LVD + EMC or RED + Battery Regulation). Many Chinese power banks designed for domestic market may use frequency channels or wireless protocols (e.g., specific Qi variants) that require re-characterisation for EU compliance.
gap.zh: 含集成电子元件的移动电源（USB充电IC、保护电路、显示屏或无线功能）须证明符合EMC或RED的法定基本要求。EN 55032/EN 55035及RED协调标准是自愿的符合性推定路径，并非强制或排他的测试方法。中国GB/T 9254及SRRC核准可支持工程审查，但不能作为欧盟技术文件的独立充分证据。对于须适用RED的产品：（1）产品不得在欧盟禁用频段发射；（2）若产品使用非协调无线接口，可能须进行公告机构评审；（3）欧盟符合性声明须列出所有适用指令（LVD+EMC或RED+电池法规）。许多面向中国市场设计的移动电源可能使用的频道或无线协议（如特定Qi变体）需经重新表征方可满足欧盟合规。
gap.zht: 含整合電子元件的行動電源（USB充電IC、保護電路、顯示幕或無線功能）須證明符合EMC或RED的法定基本要求。EN 55032/EN 55035及RED協調標準是自願的符合性推定路徑，並非強制或排他的測試方法。中國GB/T 9254及SRRC核准可支持工程審查，但不能作為歐盟技術文件的獨立充分證據。對於須適用RED的產品：（1）產品不得在歐盟禁用頻段發射；（2）若產品使用非協調無線接口，可能須進行公告機構評審；（3）歐盟符合性聲明須列出所有適用指令（LVD+EMC或RED+電池法規）。許多面向中國市場設計的行動電源可能使用的頻道或無線協議（如特定Qi變體）需經重新表徵方可滿足歐盟合規。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory legal obligation — EMC Directive 2014/30/EU or RED 2014/53/EU essential requirements apply to power banks with integrated electronics placed on the EU market; EN/ETSI harmonised standards are voluntary presumption-of-conformity routes; CE marking must cover all applicable directives
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic market — GB/T 9254.1 EMC compliance required; SRRC type approval mandatory for wireless products sold in China (administered by MIIT)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Power banks are electronic apparatus subject to EU EMC Directive 2014/30/EU, and wireless variants are subject to RED 2014/53/EU. EN 55032/EN 55035 and applicable ETSI EN standards are voluntary harmonised-standard routes to presumption of conformity; they are not mandatory or exclusive. Chinese GB/T 9254 reports are not standalone EU conformity evidence. The CE technical file must cover LVD, EMC (or RED), and Battery Regulation 2023/1542 obligations simultaneously.
compliance_verdict.zh: 【仅供参考】移动电源属于电子装置，须适用欧盟EMC指令2014/30/EU；无线型号还须适用RED 2014/53/EU。EN 55032/EN 55035及适用的ETSI EN标准是自愿协调标准路径，可用于获得符合性推定；其并非强制或排他路径。中国GB/T 9254报告不能作为独立的欧盟符合性证据。CE技术文件须同时涵盖LVD、EMC（或RED）及电池法规2023/1542义务。
compliance_verdict.zht: 【僅供參考】行動電源屬於電子裝置，須適用歐盟EMC指令2014/30/EU；無線型號還須適用RED 2014/53/EU。EN 55032/EN 55035及適用的ETSI EN標準是自願協調標準路徑，可用於獲得符合性推定；其並非強制或排他路徑。中國GB/T 9254報告不能作為獨立的歐盟符合性證據。CE技術文件須同時涵蓋LVD、EMC（或RED）及電池法規2023/1542義務。

source.publisher: European Commission — Harmonised standards for EMC Directive 2014/30/EU
